summary: Up‑front soundboard captures a rare, high‑energy 1995 show highlighted by a scorching Help>Slip>Franklin's and an epic Scarlet Fire.
review: The performance is praised as one of the best of the final tour, with standout moments like Help>Slip>Franklin's, Scarlet Fire, Vince’s lively playing on The Same Thing, and a surprisingly engaging jam at the end of Eternity. Reviewers note the recording sounds more forward than other boards, delivering excellent clarity despite a few minor vocal miscues and the occasional “cheesy answers” section.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both musical performance (majority 5‑star show comments) and recording quality (noted as the best, up‑front soundboard), with only minor performance hiccups lowering the overall score slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Up‑front mix described as clearer and more forward than other boards; no major dropouts or muffiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong setlist with rare energy for the era; song selection kept momentum high and the second half built to an epic climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Lively and spry on Loose Lucy, overall energetic playing.
band_member_comments.Bob: Occasional misstep noted as “cheesy answers” during a spacey section.
band_member_comments.Keys: Vince’s keyboard work shines on The Same Thing and adds to the show’s energy.
